elements.label: text

elements.text: 8701.1: Servicing Community Land Trust Mortgages
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains information related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Key terms used in this chapter
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Tracking Community Land Trust Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Servicing requirements applicable to Community Land Trust Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Community Land Trust Ground Lease Rider
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Leasehold Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Resale restrictions
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ General notice, disclosure and foreclosure requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Cancelation of Borrower-paid mortgage insurance
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Concurrent and Subsequent Transfers of Servicing with respect to Community Land Trust
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Excess proceeds
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Key terms used in this chapter
elements.label: text

elements.text: Key terms and definitions used in this Chapter 8701 (e.g., Community Land Trust and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Community Land Trust Mortgage) can be found in the Glossary. Servicers of Community
elements.label: text

elements.text: Land Trust Mortgages should be familiar with such key terms and definitions found therein.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Refer to Chapter 4502 for specific requirements for selling Community Land Trust
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages to Freddie Mac, including, but not limited to, requirements for the specified form
elements.label: text

elements.text: of ground lease (the “Community Land Trust Ground Lease”) and Form 490, Community
elements.label: text

elements.text: Land Trust Ground Lease Rider. References to “ground lease, as amended” in this chapter
elements.label: text

elements.text: refer to the executed and recorded Community Land Trust Ground Lease, as amended by
elements.label: text

elements.text: Form 490.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Tracking Community Land Trust Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers of Community Land Trust Mortgages must implement policies, procedures and
elements.label: text

elements.text: systems to identify and track Community Land Trust Mortgages to ensure that such
elements.label: text

elements.text: Community Land Trust Mortgages are serviced in accordance with the Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of the Guide and this chapter.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Servicing requirements applicable to Community Land Trust Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers of Community Land Trust Mortgages must service Community Land Trust
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages in accordance with the Servicing requirements of the Guide and this chapter. The
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing requirements of this chapter are applicable only to the Servicing of Community
elements.label: text

elements.text: Land Trust Mortgages. If any Servicing requirement in this chapter is inconsistent with a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing requirement set forth elsewhere in the Guide (except for requirements to comply
elements.label: text

elements.text: with applicable law, which supersede any other Servicing requirement in the Guide), the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer must comply with the Servicing requirement set forth in this chapter with respect to
elements.label: text

elements.text: any Community Land Trust Mortgage.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers must not apply any of the requirements set forth in this chapter to a
elements.label: text

elements.text: non-Community Land Trust Mortgage but rather should continue Servicing such Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: in accordance with all other Servicing requirements of the Guide and other applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: Purchase Documents.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Community Land Trust Ground Lease Rider
elements.label: text

elements.text: In accordance with Section 4502.7, a Community Land Trust Mortgage must be originated
elements.label: text

elements.text: using Form 490, which must be completed and executed by both the lessor (Community
elements.label: text

elements.text: Land Trust or its duly authorized representative) and each lessee (Borrower) and recorded in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the land records along with the Community Land Trust Ground Lease and applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: Security Instrument.
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Servicer must comply with the provisions of Form 490 when Servicing the Community
elements.label: text

elements.text: Land Trust Mortgage including, but not limited to, provisions related to the following:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Servicer must honor the lessor’s timely exercise of certain rights that may be
elements.label: text

elements.text: available to it under the ground lease, as amended
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The termination of any resale restrictions contained in the ground lease, as amended upon
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosure (or expiration of any applicable redemption period) or recordation of a deed￾in-lieu of foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For a Borrower being considered for an alternative to foreclosure, the Servicer is not
elements.label: text

elements.text: required to obtain the lessor’s approval of any proposed workout or relief options
elements.label: text

elements.text: (e) Leasehold Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: Unless inconsistent with a Servicing requirement set forth in this Chapter 8701, all Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of the Guide governing Mortgages secured by leasehold estates (leasehold
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages) apply to Community Land Trust Mortgages.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Additional requirements for Leasehold Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: Topic Guide location
elements.label: text

elements.text: Requirements for Servicing leasehold Mortgages, if termination
elements.label: text

elements.text: of the lease will jeopardize Freddie Mac’s lien position or
elements.label: text

elements.text: interest in the property
elements.label: text

elements.text: Sections 9301.6(d),
elements.label: text

elements.text: Requirements to negotiate the extension of the current term of a
elements.label: text

elements.text: lease (or applicable renewal options) in the event the current
elements.label: text

elements.text: term of a lease (or applicable renewal options) terminate earlier
elements.label: text

elements.text: than five years after the maturity date of the proposed
elements.label: text

elements.text: modification of a leasehold Mortgage
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 9206.1(c)(ii)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (f) Resale restrictions
elements.label: text

elements.text: As described in Chapter 4502, the Community Land Trust Ground Lease includes resale
elements.label: text

elements.text: restrictions. Unless inconsistent with a Servicing requirement set forth in this Chapter 8701,
elements.label: text

elements.text: all Servicing requirements of the Guide governing Mortgages secured by properties subject
elements.label: text

elements.text: to resale restrictions that terminate upon foreclosure (or expiration of any applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: redemption period) or recordation of a deed-in-lieu of foreclosure apply to Community Land
elements.label: text

elements.text: Trust Mortgages.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Additional requirements for resale restrictions
elements.label: text

elements.text: Topic Guide location
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac Standard Short Sale (“short sale”) evaluation
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements for Mortgages secured by properties subject to
elements.label: text

elements.text: resale restrictions, unless inconsistent with a Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirement set forth in this Chapter 8701
elements.label: text

elements.text: Sections 9208.1(b)(iii)
elements.label: text

elements.text: Foreclosure sale bidding requirements on properties subject to
elements.label: text

elements.text: resale restrictions
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 9301.8(a)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (g) General notice, disclosure and foreclosure requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: In addition to any disclosures and notices required by applicable law, the Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: provide to the Borrower all disclosures and notices required under the ground lease, as
elements.label: text

elements.text: amended, on a timely basis. The Servicer must retain copies of all such disclosures and
elements.label: text

elements.text: notices in the Mortgage file.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Regardless of the additional Servicing requirements specified in this chapter that are
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable only to Community Land Trust Mortgages, in the event a foreclosure sale occurs,
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Servicer’s performance will be measured against Freddie Mac’s State foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: timelines (refer to Exhibit 83, Freddie Mac State Foreclosure Timelines).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (h) Cancelation of Borrower-paid mortgage insurance
elements.label: text

elements.text: For the purpose of canceling Borrower-paid mortgage insurance based on the original value,
elements.label: text

elements.text: for a Community Land Trust Mortgage, “value” is determined in accordance with the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of Section 4502.5 (see also Section 4203.1(a)).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Concurrent and Subsequent Transfers of Servicing with respect to Community Land
elements.label: text

elements.text: Trust Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: In addition to the requirements governing Concurrent Transfers of Servicing and Subsequent
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfers of Servicing set forth elsewhere in the Guide, the Transferor Servicer must inform
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Transferee Servicer whether the Transfer of Servicing involves Community Land Trust
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages and, upon request, must provide a list of such Community Land Trust Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: (identified, at a minimum, by Transferor Servicer loan number and Freddie Mac loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: number) to the Transferee Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (j) Excess proceeds
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Community Land Trust may be entitled to any applicable excess proceeds when there is
elements.label: text

elements.text: a transfer of title on a Community Land Trust property that occurs as a result of such
elements.label: text

elements.text: property being sold by:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Borrower for an amount exceeding the resale restricted price, or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Freddie Mac after acquiring title through a completed foreclosure sale or deed-in-lieu of
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: Excess proceeds on Community Land Trust properties are those proceeds that are above the
elements.label: text

elements.text: amount required to satisfy the total indebtedness, including any additional liens, claims or
elements.label: text

elements.text: encumbrances, in addition to any amount(s) incurred during an REO holding period if title
elements.label: text

elements.text: was acquired by Freddie Mac via a completed foreclosure sale or deed-in-lieu of foreclosure.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Upon satisfaction of the total indebtedness as outlined above, any excess proceeds should be
elements.label: text

elements.text: distributed as outlined below:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For properties that are sold by the Borrower for an amount exceeding the resale restricted
elements.label: text

elements.text: price agreed upon in the Community Land Trust Ground Lease:
elements.label: text

elements.text:  First to the Borrower and Community Land Trust for equity due as agreed upon in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Community Land Trust Ground Lease, and
elements.label: text

elements.text:  All remaining excess proceeds to Community Land Trust when the Community Land
elements.label: text

elements.text: Trust Ground Lease includes terms for excess proceeds to be distributed to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Community Land Trust
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For properties that are sold by Freddie Mac after acquiring title through a completed
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosure sale or deed-in-lieu of foreclosure:
elements.label: text

elements.text:  First to Freddie Mac for any amount(s) incurred during an REO holding period, as
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable, and
elements.label: text

elements.text:  All remaining excess proceeds to the Community Land Trust when the Community
elements.label: text

elements.text: Land Trust Ground Lease includes terms for excess proceeds to be distributed to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Community Land Trust
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: Servicers will not be responsible for these REO activities. For more information on
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer responsibilities on REO properties, see Chapter 9601.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 8701.2: Early Delinquency Counseling and
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Delinquency management for Community Land Trust
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages (09/10/25)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Early Delinquency Counseling
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Delinquency management process for Community Land Trust Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Early Delinquency Counseling
elements.label: text

elements.text: Unless otherwise noted below, the requirements for special Servicing and Early Delinquency
elements.label: text

elements.text: Counseling as described in Sections 9101.1 and 9102.4, as applicable, apply to Community
elements.label: text

elements.text: Land Trust Mortgages, regardless of the Mortgage Product type.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Servicer has knowledge or reason to believe that a lessor (Community Land Trust or its
elements.label: text

elements.text: duly authorized representative) has established program requirements to offer Early
elements.label: text

elements.text: Delinquency Counseling (e.g., analyzing the Borrower's financial situation during a
elements.label: text

elements.text: counseling session and developing a plan of action for solving the Delinquency) and/or has
elements.label: text

elements.text: offered Early Delinquency Counseling to a delinquent Borrower on a Community Land Trust
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgage, then the Servicer is not required to offer Early Delinquency Counseling.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the Servicer is not required to offer Early Delinquency Counseling, as noted above, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer must document the basis for not offering such counseling in the Mortgage file.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Delinquency management process for Community Land Trust Mortgages
elements.label: text

elements.text: The steps below describe the process that Servicers must follow, in addition to other
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicing requirements of the Guide, when a Borrower obligated under a Community Land
elements.label: text

elements.text: Trust Mortgage is delinquent in his or her Mortgage payments:
elements.label: text

elements.text: 1. Servicing requirements for Community Land Trust Mortgages during Delinquency
elements.label: text

elements.text: (i) Early Delinquency Counseling
elements.label: text

elements.text: Pursuant to Section 8701.2(a) above, if applicable, Servicers of Community Land
elements.label: text

elements.text: Trust Mortgages must offer Early Delinquency Counseling as described in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Sections 9101.1 and 9102.4, as applicable.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (ii) Lessors rights during Delinquency
elements.label: text

elements.text: Certain rights available to the lessor under the ground lease, as amended, include, but
elements.label: text

elements.text: are not limited to, curing the Delinquency on behalf of the Borrower or, if curing the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Delinquency on behalf of the Borrower is determined by the lessor not to be a viable
elements.label: text

elements.text: solution to the Delinquency, paying off the Community Land Trust Mortgage (e.g.,
elements.label: text

elements.text: by finding a new potential lessee to purchase the property from the Borrower for an
elements.label: text

elements.text: amount that pays off the total debt).
elements.label: text

elements.text: 2. Servicing requirements for Community Land Trust Mortgages prior to referral to
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers of Community Land Trust Mortgages must complete a preforeclosure referral
elements.label: text

elements.text: account review in accordance with the requirements in Section 9301.2(a).
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer must refer a Community Land Trust Mortgage to foreclosure if nothing in
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Servicer’s preforeclosure referral account review prevents the Servicer from referring
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Community Land Trust Mortgage to foreclosure.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 3. Servicing requirements for Community Land Trust Mortgages post-referral to
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: During the foreclosure process, the Servicer may, but is not obligated to, provide notice
elements.label: text

elements.text: to the lessor that describes how it may, via written notice to the Servicer, express its
elements.label: text

elements.text: intention to exercise certain rights available to it under the ground lease, as amended.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Upon delivery of such notice to the lessor, if applicable, the lessor must give written
elements.label: text

elements.text: notice to the Servicer of its intention to exercise certain rights available to it under the
elements.label: text

elements.text: ground lease, as amended, within the time frame specified by the Servicer. If such written
elements.label: text

elements.text: notice is given to the Servicer timely, upon receipt, the Servicer may suspend foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: proceedings to allow the lessor to exercise such rights. If a foreclosure sale date is
elements.label: text

elements.text: scheduled, the Servicer may, to the extent possible and in accordance with applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: law, extend the foreclosure sale date.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 8801: Servicing Requirements for
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: 8801.1: Servicing Cooperative Share Loans (09/10/25)
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains information related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Key terms for Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Servicers of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Servicing requirements applicable to Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Combined Cooperative Units
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Amendments to the Proprietary Lease
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Cooperative Share Loans recognized as personal property
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Notifications to/from the Cooperative Corporation and insurers
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Stock transfer fee (“flip tax”)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Key terms for Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: Key terms and definitions used in this Chapter 8801 (e.g., Cooperative Share Loan) can be
elements.label: text

elements.text: found in the Glossary. Servicers of Cooperative Share Loans should be familiar with such
elements.label: text

elements.text: key terms and definitions found therein.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: The terms “Mortgage” and “Mortgaged Premises” as used in the Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements of the Guide include (as the context requires) the terms “Cooperative Share
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan” and “Cooperative Unit”, respectively. As such, Servicing requirements pertaining to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Mortgages or Mortgaged Premises apply respectively to Cooperative Share Loans or
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Units.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Servicers of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Servicer does not need to obtain Freddie Mac’s prior written approval to service
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loans, nor must the Servicer be a Seller/Servicer approved to sell
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loans to Freddie Mac in accordance with Chapter 5705.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: Refer to Chapter 5705 for specific requirements for selling Cooperative Share Loans to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac, including, but not limited to, the approval process to sell Cooperative Share
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loans to Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: For each Cooperative Share Loan being serviced for Freddie Mac, the Servicer must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Service the Cooperative Share Loan in accordance with the Servicing requirements of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Guide and this chapter
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Verify that the UCC-1 Financing Statements are current and valid to perfect
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac’s security interest; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Recognize that it is responsible for understanding the responsibilities, rights and available
elements.label: text

elements.text: remedies under the Cooperative Project Documents and the Recognition Agreement
elements.label: text

elements.text: between the Cooperative Corporation and the lender, its successors or its assigns and will
elements.label: text

elements.text: protect Freddie Mac’s interest under the terms of such documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Servicing requirements applicable to Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicing requirements of this chapter are applicable only to the Servicing of
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loans.
elements.label: text

elements.text: If any Servicing requirement in this chapter is inconsistent with a Servicing requirement set
elements.label: text

elements.text: forth elsewhere in the Guide (except for requirements to comply with applicable law, which
elements.label: text

elements.text: supersede any other Servicing requirement in the Guide), then the Servicer must comply with
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Servicing requirement set forth in this chapter with respect to any Cooperative Share
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers must not apply any of the requirements set forth in this chapter to a
elements.label: text

elements.text: non-Cooperative Share Loan but rather should continue Servicing such Mortgages in
elements.label: text

elements.text: accordance with all other Servicing requirements of the Guide and other applicable Purchase
elements.label: text

elements.text: Documents.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Combined Cooperative Units
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Cooperative Share Loan secured by a First Lien on the Cooperative Interest to Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Units that were combined into a single unit must be serviced as a 1-unit dwelling, and, in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: event of a foreclosure, the Cooperative Share Loan must be foreclosed as a 1-unit dwelling.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: Refer to Section 5705.9 for selling requirements for combined Cooperative Units.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (e) Amendments to the Proprietary Lease
elements.label: text

elements.text: Without the prior written consent of Freddie Mac, a Servicer must not approve or consent to
elements.label: text

elements.text: any amendments to the Proprietary Lease if such amendment affects the rights of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loan Borrower.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See also Section 8801.3(b) for loan modification requirements for a Cooperative Share
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan and the Proprietary Lease.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (f) Cooperative Share Loans recognized as personal property
elements.label: text

elements.text: If a Cooperative Share Loan is recognized as personal property and a title insurance policy
elements.label: text

elements.text: cannot be issued (refer to Section 4702.6 for title insurance requirements for cooperatives):
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ In the event of a loan modification, when it is necessary to record the modification
elements.label: text

elements.text: agreement to retain the modified Cooperative Share Loan’s First Lien position, where a
elements.label: text

elements.text: title endorsement or similar title insurance product would otherwise need to be obtained
elements.label: text

elements.text: pursuant to Section 9206.2(c) if a title insurance policy was issued, then the Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: must warrant that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The Cooperative Share Loan Borrower continues to have good and marketable title to
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Cooperative Shares; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The Cooperative Corporation continues to have good and marketable title to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Project
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ When foreclosing on a Cooperative Share Loan, in lieu of supplying foreclosure counsel
elements.label: text

elements.text: with a copy of the title insurance policy pursuant to Section 9301.2(f) (or, for Senior
elements.label: text

elements.text: Subordinate Mortgages, pursuant to Section 8601.5(b)), then the Servicer must provide
elements.label: text

elements.text: evidence of title supporting the warranty that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The Cooperative Share Loan Borrower has good and marketable title to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Shares; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The Cooperative Corporation has good and marketable title to the Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Project
elements.label: text

elements.text: (g) Notifications to/from the Cooperative Corporation and insurers
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer must have processes in place and must have given notice to all appropriate
elements.label: text

elements.text: parties (including, but not limited to, the Cooperative Corporation and insurers, as
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable), as necessary, so that the Servicer is in receipt of the following notifications in a
elements.label: text

elements.text: timely manner:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Notifications the Cooperative Corporation is legally bound to provide that are of a
elements.label: text

elements.text: material and adverse nature to Sellers (refer to Section 5705.6(d) regarding the rights of
elements.label: text

elements.text: cooperative Shareholders and Sellers)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Any notifications from the Cooperative Corporation relating to the rights granted to a
elements.label: text

elements.text: lender, its successors or assigns, in the Cooperative Project Documents or Recognition
elements.label: text

elements.text: Agreement (refer to Section 5705.6(h) regarding the Cooperative Corporation
elements.label: text

elements.text: responsibilities and Seller/Servicer rights); and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Notifications regarding any substantive lapse in compliance with any of the insurance
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements. (Refer to Section 5705.6(d) regarding the rights of cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Shareholders and Sellers and Section 8801.2(b) for Servicing requirements in the event of
elements.label: text

elements.text: a reduction or cancelation in insurance coverage.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: Upon receipt of a notification regarding the following, the Servicer must notify Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: (Distressed_Property@FreddieMac.com) and include the Servicer’s recommendation on
elements.label: text

elements.text: how to proceed:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A proposed action that requires the consent of a specified percentage of eligible lenders
elements.label: text

elements.text: of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A lender’s right to review and approve:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Any surrender, cancelation, modification, assignment or pledge of any documents
elements.label: text

elements.text: evidencing ownership, possession and use of the Shareholder’s Cooperative Unit
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Any further or additional pledge or mortgage of any documents evidencing
elements.label: text

elements.text: ownership, possession, and use of the Shareholder’s Cooperative Unit
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ Any action to change the size, existence or form of ownership of the Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Project
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac must be provided sufficient opportunity, but no less than five Business
elements.label: text

elements.text: Days before any deadline given, to review and provide comments.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (h) Stock transfer fee (“flip tax”)
elements.label: text

elements.text: For Cooperative Share Loans where the imposition of a flip tax is permitted (refer to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 5705.5(f) regarding Cooperative Share Loans subject to a stock transfer fee),
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will reimburse the Servicer the paid flip tax in the event it is imposed as a result
elements.label: text

elements.text: of a foreclosure, a transfer by the Cooperative Share Loan Borrower in lieu of foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: (“deed-in-lieu of foreclosure”) or a transfer of the Cooperative Share Loan Borrower’s
elements.label: text

elements.text: interest in the Cooperative Unit as a result of a completed short sale.
elements.label: text

elements.text: To be reimbursed, the Servicer must obtain written pre-approval from Freddie Mac by
elements.label: text

elements.text: submitting a request for pre-approval (RPA) via the RPA functionality in PAID (Payments
elements.label: text

elements.text: Automated Intelligent and Dynamic) (see Exhibit 88, Servicing Tools).
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See also Section 8801.2(d) regarding reimbursement of expenses incurred on a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loan.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 8801.2: Transfers of Servicing, financial obligations
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: and insurance considerations (04/08/26)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Transfers of Servicing with respect to Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Reduction or cancelation in insurance coverage maintained by the Cooperative Corporation
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Cooperative Share Loan expenses that may become First Liens on the property
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Reimbursement of Cooperative Share Loan expenses
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Transfers of Servicing with respect to Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: A Transferee Servicer, whether in a Concurrent or Subsequent Transfer of Servicing
elements.label: text

elements.text: involving Cooperative Share Loans, does not need to be a Seller/Servicer approved to sell
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loans to Freddie Mac in accordance with Chapter 5705 in order to service
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loans for Freddie Mac when engaging in the Transfer of Servicing with a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferor Servicer.
elements.label: text

elements.text: In addition to the requirements governing Concurrent Transfers of Servicing and Subsequent
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transfers of Servicing set forth elsewhere in the Guide, for each Cooperative Share Loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: being serviced for Freddie Mac:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Transferor Servicer must verify that the UCC-1 Financing Statements are current and
elements.label: text

elements.text: valid to perfect Freddie Mac’s security interest on the Effective Date of Transfer; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Consistent with the requirements in Section 7101.7(b), the Transferee Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: provide notice to all appropriate parties (including, but not limited to, the Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Corporation and insurers, as applicable), as necessary, to avoid disruption in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Transferee Servicer’s timely receipt of any notifications from the Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Corporation and insurers.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: Refer to Section 8801.1(g) regarding notifications from the Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Corporation and insurers.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Reduction or cancelation in insurance coverage maintained by the Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Corporation
elements.label: text

elements.text: For insurance being maintained by the Cooperative Corporation under Chapter 8202, when
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Servicer learns that any of the required insurance coverage(s) will be reduced or no
elements.label: text

elements.text: longer in force, the Servicer must contact the Cooperative Corporation to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Determine the reasons for the reduction or cancelation in insurance coverage and whether
elements.label: text

elements.text: and when such insurance coverage will be reinstated; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Advise the Cooperative Corporation that the lack of adequate insurance coverage will
elements.label: text

elements.text: make future Cooperative Share Loans in the Cooperative Project ineligible for sale to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac
elements.label: text

elements.text: If the insurance coverage is not reinstated within 60 days after the reduction or cancelation,
elements.label: text

elements.text: then the Servicer must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Advise its loan origination staff, if any, that future Cooperative Share Loans in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Project are not eligible for sale to Freddie Mac; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Immediately notify Freddie Mac (Distressed_Property@FreddieMac.com) of the
elements.label: text

elements.text: reduction or cancelation in insurance coverage and include the Servicer’s
elements.label: text

elements.text: recommendation on how to proceed
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Cooperative Share Loan expenses that may become First Liens on the property
elements.label: text

elements.text: In consideration of the requirements in Section 9301.6(e), if a delinquent expense (as listed
elements.label: text

elements.text: below) is or may become a First Lien on the property or that if not paid would result in the
elements.label: text

elements.text: subordination of Freddie Mac’s interests, then the Servicer must obtain written pre-approval
elements.label: text

elements.text: from Freddie Mac by submitting a request for pre-approval (RPA) via the RPA functionality
elements.label: text

elements.text: in PAID (Payments Automated Intelligent and Dynamic) (see Exhibit 88, Servicing Tools)
elements.label: text

elements.text: before advancing and paying any such expense, when and to the extent necessary, to protect
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac’s interests. These expenses include:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Cooperative Corporation assessments that represent the Pro Rata Share; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For a Cooperative Unit located in the State of New York, Cooperative Unit Maintenance
elements.label: text

elements.text: Fees (and any associated collection expenses)
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See also Section 8801.2(d) regarding reimbursement of expenses incurred on a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loan.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Reimbursement of Cooperative Share Loan expenses
elements.label: text

elements.text: The Servicer must obtain written pre-approval from Freddie Mac by an RPA) via the RPA
elements.label: text

elements.text: functionality in PAID to be reimbursed for the following expenses incurred on a Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Share Loan:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Flip tax pursuant to Section 8801.1(h); and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Cooperative Share Loan expenses that may become First Liens on the property pursuant
elements.label: text

elements.text: to Section 8801.2(c)
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See also Exhibit 74, Expense and Income Codes for Expense Reimbursement Claims,
elements.label: text

elements.text: regarding expense codes 014005 (Foreclosure on a Cooperative Share), 080008 (Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Share Loan – Flip Tax), 080009 (Cooperative Share Loan – Pro Rata Share Assessments)
elements.label: text

elements.text: and 080010 (Cooperative Share Loan – Maintenance Fees).
elements.label: text

elements.text: Additionally, consistent with the requirements in Section 9701.5(a), standard supporting
elements.label: text

elements.text: documentation (e.g., proof of disbursements) for reimbursement of expenses incurred on a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loan include, but are not limited to, a copy of the Cooperative Project
elements.label: text

elements.text: Documents, Recognition Agreement or other legal documents highlighting, if applicable,
elements.label: text

elements.text: that:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Cooperative Corporation assessments that represent the Pro Rata Share and/or
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Unit Maintenance Fees (and any associated collection expenses) may
elements.label: text

elements.text: become First Liens on the property
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Cooperative Share Loan is subject to the payment of a flip tax and the imposition of
elements.label: text

elements.text: the flip tax is permitted
elements.label: text

elements.text: 8801.3: Loss mitigation for Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Assumptions and workout loan assumptions of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Loan modifications of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Short sales of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Deeds-in-lieu of foreclosure of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Charge-offs of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Assumptions and workout loan assumptions of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: In the event an assumption or workout loan assumption (with or without a release of liability)
elements.label: text

elements.text: of a Cooperative Share Loan is approved, then, in addition to the approval of the application
elements.label: text

elements.text: for transfers of ownership requirements listed in Section 8406.2(c) and the approval
elements.label: text

elements.text: conditions for a workout assumption in Section 9207.1(f), as applicable, the Servicer must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Obtain the consent of the Cooperative Corporation, if such consent is required by the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Proprietary Lease, and obtain a new stock certificate, if applicable
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Ensure the transferee acquires the transferor’s ownership interest in the Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Corporation (e.g., evidenced in a stock certificate) and either obtains a new Proprietary
elements.label: text

elements.text: Lease or assumes the existing Proprietary Lease; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If applicable, timely file a UCC-1 Financing Statement naming the transferee that became
elements.label: text

elements.text: the debtor
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Loan modifications of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: When evaluating a Cooperative Share Loan Borrower for a loan modification under a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac loan modification program, in addition to the modification requirements in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 9206 and other loan modification requirements under the Purchase Documents, as
elements.label: text

elements.text: applicable, the following requirements must be met:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Servicer must ensure that the term of the Proprietary Lease must not terminate earlier
elements.label: text

elements.text: than the maturity date of the proposed modified Cooperative Share Loan. If the current
elements.label: text

elements.text: term of the Proprietary Lease terminates earlier than the maturity date of the proposed
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loan, then the term of the Proprietary Lease must be renegotiated to
elements.label: text

elements.text: satisfy this requirement
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For purposes of calculating the housing expense-to-income ratio(s), as applicable, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer must make reasonable efforts to obtain written documentation verifying the
elements.label: text

elements.text: monthly amounts of Cooperative Corporation assessments and Cooperative Unit
elements.label: text

elements.text: Maintenance Fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Consistent with the requirements in Section 9206.3(b), any delinquent Cooperative Share
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan expenses that may become First Liens on the property pursuant to Section 8801.2(c)
elements.label: text

elements.text: may be capitalized, provided that such capitalization is not prohibited by applicable law
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See also Section 8801.1(f) regarding certain Servicer warranties required in the event
elements.label: text

elements.text: of a loan modification.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Short sales of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: When evaluating a Cooperative Share Loan Borrower for a Freddie Mac Standard Short Sale
elements.label: text

elements.text: (“short sale”), in addition to the short sale requirements in Chapter 9208, the following
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements must be met:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For purposes of calculating the housing expense-to-income ratio, if applicable, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer must make reasonable efforts to obtain written documentation verifying the
elements.label: text

elements.text: monthly amounts of Cooperative Corporation assessments and Cooperative Unit
elements.label: text

elements.text: Maintenance Fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If the Servicer is considering a Cooperative Share Loan Borrower for a short sale, then
elements.label: text

elements.text: the Servicer is not delegated to approve the short sale, and the file must be sent to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac. Pursuant to Section 9208.1(b), the Servicer must submit a short sale
elements.label: text

elements.text: exception review in Resolve® with the following additional documentation:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ A detailed explanation of the Servicer’s recommendation and rationale for its
elements.label: text

elements.text: recommendation documented in the comments section of Resolve. (Note: The
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer must identify that the recommendation pertains to a Cooperative Share
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The monthly amounts of Cooperative Corporation assessments and Cooperative Unit
elements.label: text

elements.text: Maintenance Fees, as well as the total amounts of any delinquent Cooperative Share
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan expenses that may become First Liens on the property pursuant to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 8801.2(c)
elements.label: text

elements.text: In the event a short sale is approved, then, in addition to the requirements listed in
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 9208.3(a), the Servicer must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Obtain the consent of the Cooperative Corporation, if such consent is required by the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Proprietary Lease
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Ensure the buyer acquires an ownership interest in the Cooperative Corporation (e.g.,
elements.label: text

elements.text: evidenced in a new stock certificate) and obtain either the assignment of the Proprietary
elements.label: text

elements.text: Lease or a new Proprietary Lease
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If applicable, timely file a termination statement for the UCC-1 Financing Statements;
elements.label: text

elements.text: and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Unless otherwise instructed by Freddie Mac, pay, prior to and outside of the transaction,
elements.label: text

elements.text: any delinquent Cooperative Share Loan expenses that may become First Liens on the
elements.label: text

elements.text: property pursuant to Section 8801.2(c)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Deeds-in-lieu of foreclosure of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: When evaluating a Cooperative Share Loan Borrower for a Freddie Mac Standard Deed-in￾Lieu of Foreclosure (“deed-in-lieu of foreclosure”), in addition to the deed-in-lieu of
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosure requirements in Chapter 9209, the following requirements must be met:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ For purposes of calculating the housing expense-to-income ratio, if applicable, the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer must make reasonable efforts to obtain written documentation verifying the
elements.label: text

elements.text: monthly amounts of Cooperative Corporation assessments and Cooperative Unit
elements.label: text

elements.text: Maintenance Fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If the Servicer is considering a Cooperative Share Loan Borrower for a deed-in-lieu of
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosure, then the Servicer is not delegated to approve the deed-in-lieu of foreclosure,
elements.label: text

elements.text: and the file must be sent to Freddie Mac. Pursuant to Section 9209.1, the Servicer must
elements.label: text

elements.text: submit a deed-in-lieu of foreclosure exception review through Resolve with the following
elements.label: text

elements.text: additional documentation:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ A detailed explanation of the Servicer’s recommendation and rationale for its
elements.label: text

elements.text: recommendation documented in the comments section of Resolve. (Note: The
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicer must identify that the recommendation pertains to a Cooperative Share
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan.)
elements.label: text

elements.text: ❑ The monthly amounts of Cooperative Corporation assessments and Cooperative Unit
elements.label: text

elements.text: Maintenance Fees, as well as the total amounts of any delinquent Cooperative Share
elements.label: text

elements.text: Loan expenses that may become First Liens on the property pursuant to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Section 8801.2(c)
elements.label: text

elements.text: In the event a deed-in-lieu of foreclosure is approved, then, in addition to the requirements
elements.label: text

elements.text: listed in Section 9209.6, the Servicer must:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Obtain the consent of the Cooperative Corporation, if such consent is required by the
elements.label: text

elements.text: Proprietary Lease, and obtain a new stock certificate
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Ensure an ownership interest in the Cooperative Corporation is acquired (e.g., evidenced
elements.label: text

elements.text: in a new stock certificate) and obtain either the assignment of the Proprietary Lease or a
elements.label: text

elements.text: new Proprietary Lease
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ If applicable, timely file a termination statement for the UCC-1 Financing Statements;
elements.label: text

elements.text: and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Unless otherwise instructed by Freddie Mac, pay any delinquent Cooperative Share Loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: expenses that may become First Liens on the property pursuant to Section 8801.2(c)
elements.label: text

elements.text: (e) Charge-offs of Cooperative Share Loans
elements.label: text

elements.text: In the event a charge-off of a Cooperative Share Loan is approved, then, in addition to the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements listed in Section 9210.2, the Servicer must, if applicable, timely file a
elements.label: text

elements.text: termination statement for the UCC-1 Financing Statements.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See also Section 9210.1(b) regarding when a Servicer must recommend a charge-off of
elements.label: text

elements.text: a Cooperative Share Loan to Freddie Mac.
elements.label: text

elements.text: 8801.4: Delinquency management for Cooperative
elements.label: section_header

elements.text: Share Loans (04/08/26)
elements.label: text

elements.text: This section contains requirements related to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Preforeclosure referral account review
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Foreclosure of a Cooperative Share Loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Foreclosure attorney fee
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Post-foreclosure/REO
elements.label: text

elements.text: (a) Preforeclosure referral account review
elements.label: text

elements.text: In addition to the requirements in Section 9301.2(a) regarding the preforeclosure referral
elements.label: text

elements.text: account review, the Servicer must seek Freddie Mac’s approval
elements.label: text

elements.text: (Foreclosures@FreddieMac.com) to refer a Cooperative Share Loan to foreclosure if:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Servicer becomes aware of or has reason to believe that proceeding with foreclosure
elements.label: text

elements.text: on the Cooperative Share Loan is not in Freddie Mac’s best interest; and/or
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ A charge off would produce a lesser estimated loss severity, as opposed to proceeding
elements.label: text

elements.text: with foreclosure on the Cooperative Share Loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: If directed by Freddie Mac, the Servicer must submit a recommendation for a charge-off to
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac in accordance with the requirements in Section 9210.1(c).
elements.label: text

elements.text: (b) Foreclosure of a Cooperative Share Loan
elements.label: text

elements.text: When referring a Cooperative Share Loan to foreclosure, the Servicer must follow the
elements.label: text

elements.text: requirements in Chapter 9301, as such requirements may be applicable to Cooperative Units.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Additionally, consistent with the requirements in Section 9501.2, the Servicer must ensure
elements.label: text

elements.text: that the firm accepting the foreclosure referral meets the Firm Minimum Requirements (as
elements.label: text

elements.text: that term is described in Section 9501.2), including, but not limited to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ Having experience in general housing-related issues such as Cooperative Share Loans;
elements.label: text

elements.text: and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ No substantial part of the firm’s practice includes matters that are adverse to financial
elements.label: text

elements.text: institutions, such as Cooperative Corporation foreclosures
elements.label: text

elements.text: Servicers may submit any foreclosure-related questions or concerns when foreclosing on a
elements.label: text

elements.text: Cooperative Share Loan to Freddie Mac (Foreclosures@FreddieMac.com).
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: See also Section 8801.1(f) regarding certain Servicer warranties required when
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosing on a Cooperative Share Loan.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (c) Foreclosure attorney fees
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac will reimburse Servicers for reasonable attorney fees incurred in connection
elements.label: text

elements.text: with the foreclosure of a Cooperative Share Loan. Servicers must claim reimbursement using
elements.label: text

elements.text: expense code 014005 (Foreclosure on a Cooperative Share). Refer to Exhibit 57A, Approved
elements.label: text

elements.text: Attorney, Foreclosure, Mediation, Postponement Fees and Title Expenses.
elements.label: text

elements.text: See also Section 8801.2(d) regarding reimbursement of expenses incurred on a Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Share Loan.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Note: In addition to the legal services included in the attorney fees for an uncontested
elements.label: text

elements.text: foreclosure outlined in Section 9701.3(a), any transfer of the Cooperative Shares and
elements.label: text

elements.text: Proprietary Lease is also considered included.
elements.label: text

elements.text: (d) Post-foreclosure/REO
elements.label: text

elements.text: Consistent with the requirements in Sections 8601.8(a) and 9601.1(c), as applicable, once
elements.label: text

elements.text: Freddie Mac has acquired a Cooperative Unit in REO, Freddie Mac will pay the Cooperative
elements.label: text

elements.text: Corporation assessments and Cooperative Unit Maintenance Fees.
elements.label: text

elements.text: Additionally, pursuant to Section 9603.1(b), for a Cooperative Unit in REO, the Servicer
elements.label: text

elements.text: must submit to Freddie Mac any information Freddie Mac requests from the Servicer,
elements.label: text

elements.text: whether from the Mortgage file or, for documents for which a Document Custodian
elements.label: text

elements.text: maintains physical custody, from the Document Custodian. This includes, but is not limited
elements.label: text

elements.text: to:
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The stock certificate, which evidenced the Cooperative Share Loan Borrower’s
elements.label: text

elements.text: ownership interest in the Cooperative Corporation
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Cooperative Share Loan Borrower’s Proprietary Lease; and
elements.label: text

elements.text: ■ The Recognition Agreement
elements.label: text

elements.text: Chapter 8901: Servicing Requirements for
